violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (pizza cutter) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was placed in 3 bay sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024

The chlorine concentration in the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC contacted company for maintenance. Establishment is to use 3-bay sink until the dishwasher is fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back of the store), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024
(Eggs and beverages) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
Dirty mop was observed in contact with the hand sink. The mop was moved away from the hand sink at the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
